title: MilestoneReview
description: The canonical shape of a MilestoneReview record — docs/58-PHASE-2C-HEALTH-MILESTONES-ARCHITECTURE-FREEZE.md §11.2's one doctor-authored progress review per (patient, milestone_type), Batch PXP-11 (Phase 2C — Health Milestones, ADR-027). Non-AI (ADR-027): every review field is doctor-typed — never AI-generated, never auto-inferred from Symptom Log/Check-In/Calculator/Care Plan data (docs/58 §5 item 2). Doctor-authored/patient-viewable, mirroring CarePlan's ownership: created `draft` (private to roster doctors), one-way `draft`->`published` transition (publish_milestone_review) as the sole patient-visibility boundary. A published review makes its milestone point read `completed` in the computed schedule; a draft never does (docs/58 §5 item 3).

review_id.description: Server-generated UUID (generateFoundationId_()), this row's own identity — never doctor-supplied.

patient_id.description: Roster-validated at write (reuses DoctorPatientRoster.gs). At most one review per (patient_id, milestone_type).

track_id.description: References the parent MilestoneTrack (milestone-track.schema.json) — the anchor this review's milestone point counts from.

milestone_type.description: The fixed milestone point (docs/21, docs/58 §7) this review documents. The enum is deliberately closed to these four.

target_date.description: The point's computed target date (care_start_date + the point's offset, docs/58 §7), server-computed at authoring — never client-supplied. Denormalized here for an honest audit of what the schedule showed when the doctor wrote the review; the live schedule recomputes it for display.

improvements.description: Doctor-typed. The 'Improvements' dimension. Empty-string sentinel if omitted.

medicines_review.description: Doctor-typed free-text commentary. The 'Medicines' dimension — NOT a structural reference to DoctorInstruction/MedicationHistory (docs/58 §0.2). Empty-string sentinel if omitted.

investigations.description: Doctor-typed. The 'Investigations' dimension. Empty-string sentinel if omitted.

recommendations.description: Doctor-typed. The 'Recommendations' dimension. Empty-string sentinel if omitted.

next_goals.description: Doctor-typed. The 'Next goals' dimension. Empty-string sentinel if omitted.

status.description: Always 'draft' at creation; transitions one-way to 'published' exactly once (docs/58 §10.2/§10.3). Only a 'published' review is ever returned to a patient.

updated_at.description: Server-set on each draft edit. Empty-string sentinel until the first edit.

published_at.description: Server-set at the moment status transitions to 'published'. Empty-string sentinel while still a draft.
